summary: Iteration 219 - OrbitalHubBase, BotanyOrbital, HexagramJournal Testing Complete. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: BotanyOrbital page with center sun, 9 orbital planets, detail panels, Five Elements Wheel overlay, CosmicSparkline. HexagramJournal page with Book of Changes title, journal entries, Record Now button, expandable entries. Mission Control has Book of Changes and Botany Orbital action items.

ui_bugs.issue: Full Codex View button click intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay
ui_bugs.workaround: Button exists and is functional, just needs z-index adjustment or badge repositioning

action_items: Consider adjusting z-index of 'Full Codex View' button or repositioning 'Made with Emergent' badge to prevent click interception
critical_code_review_comments: hexagram_journal.py: POST /api/hexagram/journal/record correctly computes hexagram and only records if different from last entry
hexagram_journal.py: GET /api/hexagram/journal returns entries sorted by timestamp desc with limit parameter support
OrbitalHubBase.js: Universal 3D orbital canvas with gravity constants engine computing radius/speed from node count and stability
OrbitalHubBase.js: Hexagram gate logic correctly locks nodes based on hexagram.bits array (requiredBit property)
OrbitalHubBase.js: Pointer-events layering correct - nodes have auto, visual effects have none
BotanyOrbital.js: Generates 9 orbital planets from botanical data (5 elements + Garden + Resonance + Balance + Identify + Alchemy)
BotanyOrbital.js: Alchemy node correctly locked behind requiredBit: 2 (elements explored >= 3)
BotanyOrbital.js: Detail panel opens on planet selection showing relevant data (plant list, garden list, resonance score)
HexagramJournal.js: Book of Changes page displays journal entries with hexagram lines, name, timestamp, stability
HexagramJournal.js: Entries expandable to show trigrams, energies, changing lines, equilibrium
MissionControl.js: New action items for Book of Changes (/hexagram-journal) and Botany Orbital (/botany-orbital)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 219 verified: (1) POST /api/hexagram/journal/record records hexagram transition if changed, returns recorded:false with reason:no_change if same. (2) GET /api/hexagram/journal returns entries sorted by timestamp desc, supports limit param. (3) /botany-orbital route renders OrbitalHubBase with center sun 'Botanical Codex', 9 orbiting planets (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water, Garden, Resonance, Identify, Alchemy). (4) Alchemy node locked behind hexagram bit 2 (opacity 0.2, shows 'locked'). (5) Detail panel opens on planet click showing plant list for elements, garden list for garden node. (6) Five Elements Wheel overlay in bottom-left, CosmicSparkline in top-right. (7) /hexagram-journal route renders Book of Changes page with journal entries, Record Now button, expandable entries showing trigrams/energies/equilibrium. (8) Mission Control has 'Book of Changes' and 'Botany Orbital' action items. (9) SVG connection lines render between center and planets (26 lines found). (10) Orbital drag rotation works. (11) Back button navigates to /hub. Current hexagram: #3 屯 Zhun (Difficulty at the Beginning), stability: volatile.

hexagram_journal_record_endpoint.details: POST /api/hexagram/journal/record records transition if hexagram changed, returns recorded:false with reason:no_change if same

hexagram_journal_get_endpoint.details: GET /api/hexagram/journal returns entries sorted by timestamp desc, supports limit parameter

botany_orbital_route.details: /botany-orbital renders OrbitalHubBase with center sun and 9 orbiting planets

orbital_center_sun.details: Center sun labeled 'Botanical Codex' with leaf icon renders correctly

orbital_element_planets.details: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water element nodes render as orbiting planets

orbital_special_nodes.details: Garden, Resonance, Balance, Identify, Alchemy nodes present

alchemy_node_locked.details: Alchemy node locked behind hexagram bit 2 (opacity 0.2, shows 'locked' text)

orbital_detail_panel.details: Clicking orbital planet opens detail panel on right side with relevant data

orbital_pointer_events.details: Orbital nodes have pointer-events: auto, visual effects have pointer-events: none

cosmic_sparkline_overlay.details: CosmicSparkline renders in top-right with stability indicator

five_elements_wheel_overlay.details: Five Elements Wheel renders in bottom-left

hexagram_glitch_wrapper.details: HexagramGlitch wrapper present, activates when hexagram is transitioning

orbital_drag_rotation.details: Orbital canvas supports drag rotation of planet ring

depth_indicator.details: Depth indicator correctly hidden at depth 0

full_codex_view_button.details: Button exists but click intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay

journal_entries_display.details: Journal entries show hexagram lines, name, timestamp, stability

journal_entry_expansion.details: Entries expandable to show trigrams, energies, changing lines, equilibrium

mission_control_book_of_changes.details: Mission Control has 'Book of Changes' action item linking to /hexagram-journal

mission_control_botany_orbital.details: Mission Control has 'Botany Orbital' action item linking to /botany-orbital

svg_connection_lines.details: 26 SVG connection lines render between center sun and orbiting planets

back_button_navigation.details: Back button on Botany Orbital navigates to /hub
